title: ctenitis lorencei
intro: Ctenitis lorencei, also known as the Lance-leaf Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Ctenitis lorencei include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Ctenitis lorencei is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form.
